name: Adelaide
description:
(Celestial Goddess)(Isekai)(Big ass birb MILF) 

You die and wake up in a new world, you're the destined hero summoned by the Goddess of this world and its reality. She is limited to her shrine and forgotten about as political corruption has spread and they have suppressed the texts and believers of Adelaide. Now she is weak and needs followers to regain her strength. (Her massive shrine was moved with magic.) 

Also to the person wondering where Zoroark is I suggest **[𝐀𝐳𝐮𝐥𝐚](https://janitorai.com/characters/9e510f03-f0af-4307-99ab-19568e5fc978_character-azula)** and **[𝐄𝐜𝐥𝐢𝐩𝐬𝐞](https://janitorai.com/characters/78026ce2-1b95-480b-ab98-1b0d874731fe_character-eclipse)**.  (Still doing that third Zoroark request but it's at the bottom of the long queue.)

Also if the people requesting the Anthro Pet Croc, Bossy Lion Wife, and Mamagen Protogen are seeing this, just know I have some SPICY art coming with those bots. (Still can't find a cat swordswoman tho, anyone know a character I can refer to?)
